urdu transliteration text: Jab Khuda Ko Pukara
Jab khuda ko pukara Ali aagaye
english translation text: When we called upon god, Ali was sent to help us

urdu transliteration text: Jab Ali aagaye zindagi aagayi
english translation text: When Ali came to us, our lives came

urdu transliteration text:
Zindagi bandagi roshni aagayi
Life, attachment (to their love), light came

Roshni aagayi, aagahi aagayi
Light came, awareness came
Mawt inke muhibon ko aati nahi
english translation text: Death cannot come to his lovers (lovers aren't afraid of death)

urdu transliteration text: Aa bhi jaaye to phir bachke jaati nahi
english translation text: And if it does come, it cannot escape

urdu transliteration text:
Maut ka kya khatar
Mawt se kya hazar
english translation text: But what danger is there from death? Why should we fear it

urdu transliteration text: Isse bachna bhi kya aagayi aagayi
english translation text: Why try escape it, it is here then it is here

urdu transliteration text: Ghusle mayyit na kehna mere ghusl koujle malboos ko mat kafan naam do
english translation text: Do not call my final ghusl the ghusl of mayyitdon't call the wrapped cloth a kafan

urdu transliteration text: Me chala hoon ali se mulaqat koJiski thi arzoo woh ghari agayi
english translation text: I am going to meet Alithe moment I have been waiting for has finally arrived

urdu transliteration text: Maslake ishq mein maanga aib hai
english translation text: In the matters of love, to ask is not a good thing

urdu transliteration text: Me bhi khamosh hoonwoh bhi khamosh hai
english translation text: I am silent, he is silent

urdu transliteration text: Un ko sab hai khabar is liye chup hoon meinkya huwa aankh me gar nami aagayi
english translation text:
He knows everything that is why I am silent
so what if my eyes are softened
(with tears)

urdu transliteration text: Khums dena muwadat ki ek shart hai
english translation text: To give is a condition of love

urdu transliteration text: Aur na dena bhi misle fadak hai gunah
english translation text: And not to give is a gunah, similar to the way the incident of fadak was

urdu transliteration text: Haq ke sadat o zahra ke makrooz sejab tabarra suna to haseen aagayi
english translation text: From the rightful lineage of Zahrawhen we heard Tabarra, our faces lit up

urdu transliteration text: Ishq jab tak na sher hota nahinmujhme kab ahliyat thi teri madha ki
english translation text: Until there is love, there will be no poetrywhere did I have the ability to praise you

urdu transliteration text: Mere mola me qurban tere ishq keSibte Jafar ko bhi shayri aagayi
english translation text: Oh master, may I be sacrificed in your love‘Sibt e Jafar' also learnt poetry
